bindings.quest_action: bring back medical supplies and building materials
bindings.quest_focus: the burned-out granary and half the settlement
bindings.quest_stakes: the dozen people with severe burns who are dying right now
bindings.quest_threat: the fire that destroyed our stores and drew predators from the hills
bindings.quest_origin: the fire that swept through last night

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}! Thank the stars, someone who isn't covered in ash! We need help, we need it NOW!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} started in the granary and spread to {quest_focus}. {quest_stakes} are badly burned, and the food stores are destroyed. {target_npc} is organizing what's left, but we need {quest_item} to treat the wounded and rebuild. The nearest supply is {location_hint}, but the smoke drew {enemy_type} down from the hills.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are dying, {player_name}. Not tomorrow: right now. Please, {quest_action}.

playerResponses.text: Tell me exactly what you need and where to find it. I'm going now.
I'll cut through whatever's in the way. Just keep the wounded alive until I get back.
I'm sorry, but I'm not equipped to handle a disaster of this scale.

bindings.quest_action: get shoring materials to the trapped miners before the tunnel collapses further
bindings.quest_focus: the collapsed mine with workers trapped inside
bindings.quest_stakes: the people underground who are running out of air
bindings.quest_threat: the earthquake that cracked every foundation in the settlement
bindings.quest_origin: an earthquake that struck before dawn

dialogueChunks.intro: Don't step there! The ground is unstable! {player_name}, listen: everything is falling apart.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} collapsed the main road into a sinkhole and caved in {quest_focus} with workers still inside. {target_npc} is trying to dig them out with bare hands because our tools are buried in rubble. We need {quest_item} to {quest_action}, and the only source is {location_hint}. The aftershocks are driving {enemy_type} out of the caves.

playerResponses.text: People trapped underground? I'll get the supplies. Don't stop digging.
Earthquakes, cave-ins, and displaced monsters. What a day. I'll help.
An unstable mine with aftershocks? That's a death trap, not a rescue mission.

bindings.quest_action: get supplies through to the stranded survivors
bindings.quest_stakes: everyone stranded on high ground with no food or clean water
bindings.quest_threat: the flood that swept through and the creatures it displaced
bindings.quest_origin: the dam breaking during the storm

dialogueChunks.intro: The river is still rising, {player_name}. It hasn't stopped since yesterday.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} put us in the flood path. We barely got the elders and children to {quest_focus} before the water swept through. Houses are underwater, livestock drowned, and the {quest_item} is ruined or washed downstream. {target_npc} salvaged some tools, but it won't last. {quest_threat} pushed the {enemy_type} onto the same high ground we're sheltering on.
dialogueChunks.outro: We're stranded with monsters below and no supplies. If you don't {quest_action}, this hill becomes a grave.

playerResponses.text: I'll get through the floodwaters and bring back whatever you need.
Flood, famine, and monsters? Fine, but you owe me big.
I can't fight a river. This is beyond what one person can fix.

bindings.quest_action: patch up the wounded and seal the gaps in our walls
bindings.quest_stakes: the wounded and the undefended gaps in our walls
bindings.quest_threat: the storm that ripped the settlement apart and scattered hostile nests into our midst
bindings.quest_origin: a freak hailstorm with winds that tore roofs off like paper

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I've never seen anything like this. The sky itself turned against us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} lasted an hour and left {quest_focus} looking like a battlefield. The healer's workshop is destroyed, the forge collapsed, and the storm scattered a nest of {enemy_type} from the cliffs straight into the settlement. {target_npc} fought them off at the bridge, but they're regrouping {location_hint}. We need {quest_item} to {quest_action} before they come back.
dialogueChunks.outro: We survived the storm. Now we need to survive what it brought to our doorstep.

playerResponses.text: Storm damage and displaced monsters? I'll handle both. Point me where to go.
This is a mess, but a mess I can help clean up. What do you need first?
The storm was bad enough. Adding monsters to it is more than I can handle alone.
